back_translation: What I have been saying is, as long as the heir is still a child, [he] is no different from a slave, although [he] is the owner of all things
But [he] must be under guardians and managers, until the time appointed by the father
Likewise, when we were still children, we were dominated into being slaves under the basic principles of the world
But when the appointed time had reached fullness, God sent His Son [to come], who was born from a woman, who was born under the Law
to redeem those who are under the Law, so that we might receive the being-received-as-sons
And because you are sons, God therefore sent the Spirit of His Son to dwell in our hearts, crying out, 'Abba, Father'
Therefore you are no longer a slave, but a son; and when [you are] a son, [you are] also an heir through God
But at that time, when you did not yet know God, you were slaves serving things that by nature are not deities

But now, when you have known God, or to put it more correctly, are known by God, why are you turning back to those weak and useless principles again? Do you want to come back to being slaves of those things afresh again?
You all are currently observing specific days, months, seasons, and years!
I am concerned for you, fearing that I have toiled for you in vain
Brothers and sisters, I plead with you, become like me, because I also have become like you. You all have not wronged me at all
You all know well that I preached the gospel to you on that first occasion, because of an illness of the flesh
And although my condition was a test of your hearts, you did not despise or reject me. On the contrary, you welcomed me as a messenger of God, as if [I] were Jesus Christ Himself
Then now where is the happiness you used to feel? For I testify to you that, if it were possible, you all would have plucked out your own eyes and given them to me
Therefore, have I now become your enemy, because of speaking the truth to you?
They have a fervent heart toward you, but not in a good way. On the contrary, they want to cut you off from me, so that you might have a fervent heart toward them themselves
However, being courted earnestly in a good matter is always good, not only when I am with you
My young children, for whom I am again experiencing pains in childbirth, until Christ is formed in you
I dearly wish to be with you at this time, and to change my tone of voice, because I am troubled regarding you
Do tell me, you who want to be under the Law, are you not listening to that Law?
For it is written that Abraham had two sons, one from the slave woman, and another from the free woman
But the son of the slave woman was born according to the flesh, while the son of the free woman was born through promise
These things are spoken as a figurative comparison, that is, the two women represent two covenants. The first covenant comes from Mount Sinai, giving birth to children for slavery; this is Hagar
And the word Hagar means Mount Sinai in the region of Arabia, which corresponds to present-day Jerusalem, because this city together with her children are currently slaves
But the Jerusalem that is above is free, which is our mother

For it is written, 'Rejoice, O barren woman who has no children; break forth shouting, you who have never experienced the pains of childbirth, because the children of the abandoned woman are more than the children of the woman who has a husband'
Brothers and sisters, you all yourselves are children of the promise, just like Isaac
But just as in that time, the son who was born according to the flesh persecuted the son who was born according to the Spirit, so it is also now in the same way
But what does the Scripture say? 'Drive out the slave woman and her child, because the child of the slave woman absolutely will not receive the inheritance together with the child of the free woman'
Therefore, brothers and sisters, we are not children of the slave woman, but children of the free woman
